content: We can augment 2025's configurable swarm UAV ICM curiosity agents with a long-term memory component adapted from Memory Networks, to let agents avoid re-exploring already discovered trivial environments while retaining curiosity for under-explored niche regions of shared airspace. This solves a longstanding flaw of standard ICM where agents repeatedly get intrinsic rewards for revisiting noisy, familiar random states instead of making sustained new discoveries in multi-agent swarm settings.
